'''Maximillian Seerdon''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] who worked in the Intelligence Division of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. His father was [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kohl Seerdon]], who arranged for him to receive his high-ranking position.

A few months following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Seerdon compiled various reports of threats to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to present to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. He conferred with Grand Vizier [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]], who in turn presented the reports to the Emperor.

Impressed with Seerdon's findings, Palpatine granted him a private retreat on a Deep Core luxury world, possibly [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] named him after his own son, Max.<ref name="Ryan Kaufman's Star Wars Blog entry">{{Blog|RyanKaufman|42|Insider 89 "Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum & Villainy" Endnotes}}</ref>
